summary: Iteration 3 testing: Order model phone+address, PayPal LIVE mode config, ProductBox hero on Home, product cards SVG, variant chip → box tier badge update, Checkout 4-field form, Footer & Contact address/email. Backend: 4/4 new pytest cases green (+ 15/15 iteration_2 unchanged). Frontend: all requested testids present; hero uses SVG ProductBox (no Unsplash); variant switch updates tier badge from '1 Year | 3 Devices' to '2 Years | 5 Devices'; footer and Contact contain 'Westwood Street, Hayward, California, 94544' and 'info@buyinstantkeys.com' mailto link; simulate-btn correctly hidden in PayPal LIVE mode.
passed_backend: POST /api/orders with customer_phone + customer_address → order object contains both, GET /api/orders/{id} round-trips values
POST /api/orders without phone/address → still 200, fields are null
POST /api/orders/{id}/paypal/create → returns real paypal_order_id (LIVE mode); capture intentionally NOT invoked
passed_frontend: Home /: [data-testid='product-box-norton-360-deluxe'] present in hero; no Unsplash in hero section
Offer banner + code FLASH70 + countdown still visible above header
/product/norton-360-deluxe: clicking variant chip[2] changes SVG tier badge text from '1 Year | 3 Devices' to '2 Years | 5 Devices'
In LIVE PayPal mode: checkout-simulate-btn hidden; live PayPal buttons render (not clicked per instructions)
/contact: 'Visit us' card shows full address incl. 'United States'; 'Email us' card links via mailto:info@buyinstantkeys.com
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~979 lines — well over the 700-line advisory limit. Recommend splitting into modules (routes/orders.py, routes/coupons.py, routes/banner.py, routes/admin.py, services/paypal.py, services/email.py).

PayPal LIVE credentials are now committed via backend/.env — confirm secrets are only in env and not source control; consider server-side amount tamper protection (currently amount is recomputed server-side from DB which is correct).
PayPal LIVE mode preview page throws a benign cross-origin 'zoid destroyed all components' console error on unmount. Not blocking; expected when navigating away from checkout with SDK loaded.
seed_data_creation: Test orders TEST_i3phone@example.com, TEST_i3nophone@example.com, TEST_i3paypal@example.com created; harmless.
mocked_apis_note: PayPal now LIVE — tests only exercise create (no capture) to avoid real transactions. Resend is now sending real emails (not verified in this iteration; not part of scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_3 all green. If further changes touch Checkout, keep in mind PayPal is LIVE — never click PayPal buttons; use /api/orders/{id}/simulate-payment for e2e paid-order flow. ProductBox SVG text can be read via evaluate(document.querySelectorAll('text')) — Playwright inner_text on the SVG root can be racy immediately after mount.
